language.description: Language for generated .autopilot documents and PR bodies (e.g. ko, en, ja). Code, commits, and PR titles are always English.

mode.description: loop: repeat iterations until the user stops. single-feature: develop exactly one feature, no loop, no worktrees.

fastMode.description: Minimize review: skip E2E testing, cap review iterations at 1, code review checks critical defects (bugs, security) only. Orthogonal to mode.

unattended.description: Unattended mode: the dev loop never asks the user anything — all approval gates behave as auto and every decision point resolves to its documented safe default (logged and reported). goal.md still requires explicit user consent and is never written. Applies to the autopilot dev skill only.

parallelFeatures.description: Number of features developed in parallel per loop iteration (each in its own git worktree).

approvals.description: User approval gates. ask: pause and ask the user. auto: proceed without asking.

goalPrompt.description: Approval of each feature's Goal Prompt.

plan.description: Approval of each feature's implementation Plan.

merge.description: Approval before merging each approved PR.

codeReview.description: Run the code-reviewer agent on each PR.

e2eTest.description: Run the e2e-tester agent on each PR.

maxReviewIterations.description: Max fix-and-re-review cycles per PR before escalating to the user.

requireTests.description: Every feature must ship with tests.

testCommand.description: Command to run the test suite. null: auto-detect from the repo each run.

target.description: Minimum test coverage (%) for the code a feature changes. Feature agents keep adding tests until the target is met when coverage is measurable. null: no numeric gate (tests remain mandatory).

command.description: Command that reports test coverage (e.g. 'npm test -- --coverage', 'pytest --cov'). null: auto-detect; measurement is skipped when no tool is available.

runCommand.description: Command to start the app. null: auto-detect.

readyCheck.description: Command that exits 0 when the app is ready (e.g. curl health check).

url.description: Base URL of the running app, for HTTP/browser checks.

baseBranch.description: Branch that feature branches fork from and PRs target.

worktreeRoot.description: Directory for feature worktrees. null: sibling directory ../<repoName>__autopilot/ next to the repo.

maxIterations.description: Stop after this many loop iterations. 0: run until the user stops.

stopOnFailure.description: Halt the loop at the end of an iteration in which a feature failed.
